title: Git from Zero
description: If 'detached HEAD' sounds scary, this is for you. A short, opinionated tour of the seven Git commands you'll use 95% of the time, with mental models for what's actually happening on disk.

lessons.title: init, add, commit
lessons.content: A commit is a snapshot, not a diff. The diffs are computed on demand.

lessons.title: Branches are pointers
lessons.content: main is just a name that points at a commit. So is feature/login.

lessons.title: The three trees
lessons.content: HEAD, the index, and the working directory. reset moves things between them.
